data.summary: ĐẶNG MAI ANH TÚ demonstrates solid full-stack development experience, notably as a Full-Stack Developer at SAT Chasedream, where he led the design and development of a multi-tenant LMS platform. He brings strong proficiency in ReactJS, RESTful API design, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), and cloud platforms (AWS), and has experience with both SQL (MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server) and responsive UI development. However, there are notable gaps: no explicit experience with Node.js (Express/Nest.js), no direct mention of AI development tools such as Claude, GitHub Copilot, or Cursor, and limited evidence of senior-level leadership or architectural decision-making. While his background covers many required technologies and some AI integration, the absence of key backend stack experience and advanced AI tool usage is a significant concern for this senior full-stack AI-focused role. He is a good fit for a mid-level full-stack position but would require mentoring and upskilling in Node.js, advanced AI tool integration, and senior leadership responsibilities.
data.strengths:
• 2+ years of full-stack development experience at SAT Chasedream, including end-to-end design and implementation of a multi-tenant LMS platform.
• Strong proficiency in ReactJS and responsive UI design, as evidenced by both professional experience and project work (Koi Veterinarian System, Metro Ticket System).
• Demonstrated experience with RESTful API design, CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), and cloud platforms (AWS ECS, Lambda, S3, SQS, SES, IAM).
• Solid SQL database skills (MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server) and database design experience.
• Exposure to AI integration and a broad range of modern development tools (Docker, Postman, Git, Jira, Figma).
• Bachelor’s degree in Software Engineering from FPT University, supporting a strong technical foundation.
data.weakness:
• No explicit experience with Node.js (Express/Nest.js) — a critical backend requirement for this role, as all backend experience is in Java (Spring Boot) and C#.
• No direct mention of AI development tools such as Claude, GitHub Copilot, or Cursor, which are explicitly required for leveraging AI in development workflows.
• Limited evidence of senior-level leadership, mentoring, or architectural decision-making; current experience appears mid-level with no clear record of leading teams or major technical decisions.
• No mention of authentication methods (OAuth, JWT), which are important for secure full-stack development.
• Communication and teamwork skills are referenced but not specifically in the context of English proficiency or cross-functional product team collaboration.

criteriaScores.scoringCriteriaContext: The job posting does not specify educational requirements.
criteriaScores.aiExplanation: The candidate holds a Bachelor’s degree in Software Engineering from FPT University with a GPA of 3.21. This meets and exceeds the job's educational expectations, as the job posting does not specify any educational requirements. The degree provides a solid technical foundation for the role. There are no gaps or concerns in this area.

criteriaScores.scoringCriteriaContext: Explicitly required: Good English communication skills. Implied by the role: collaboration with product teams, rapid iteration based on feedback, and participation in code reviews suggest strong teamwork, communication, and problem-solving skills.
criteriaScores.aiExplanation: The candidate demonstrates several relevant soft skills, including communication, leadership, project management, and experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies, as listed in the resume. There is evidence of collaboration and adaptability, particularly in the SAT Chasedream role, where working under high pressure and collaborating with others is mentioned. However, there is no explicit evidence of English proficiency or direct experience collaborating with cross-functional product teams, which is a key requirement for this role. Additionally, while leadership is listed, there is no concrete example of mentoring or leading teams in a senior capacity. Overall, the candidate meets many soft skill requirements but lacks proof of senior-level communication and team leadership, especially in an English-speaking or international context.

criteriaScores.scoringCriteriaContext: The role is titled 'FullStack Developer (NodeJS, ReactJS, AI)', focusing on developing user interfaces and integrating them with backend services. Key responsibilities include using AI tools for development, building responsive UIs with React, and designing RESTful APIs with Node.js. A qualified candidate should have strong full-stack development skills and experience with AI integration.
criteriaScores.aiExplanation: The candidate's most recent title is 'Full-Stack Developer' at SAT Chasedream, which aligns with the job title requirement. The role involved end-to-end design and development of a multi-tenant LMS platform, indicating full-stack responsibilities. However, the job title does not specify seniority, and there is no mention of AI-focused development in the title or description. The candidate's experience is relevant to a full-stack developer role but lacks explicit alignment with the 'AI' and 'Senior' aspects of the job title. The candidate would be a strong fit for a mid-level full-stack developer position but does not fully match the senior AI-focused title required.

criteriaScores.scoringCriteriaContext: The position is at a 'Senior' level, implying responsibilities such as leading technical decisions, mentoring less experienced developers, and having a significant impact on project outcomes. The role requires a high degree of autonomy and expertise in full-stack development.
criteriaScores.aiExplanation: The candidate's experience and achievements are consistent with a mid-level full-stack developer. While he has led the design and development of a multi-tenant LMS platform at SAT Chasedream, there is no evidence of senior-level responsibilities such as leading teams, mentoring junior developers, or making architectural decisions across multiple projects. The resume lacks explicit references to seniority, autonomy, or significant impact on organizational outcomes. The candidate is capable and has a strong technical foundation but does not demonstrate the depth of leadership or strategic influence expected at the senior level.

criteriaScores.scoringCriteriaContext: Explicitly required: At least 4 years of software development experience, with strong proficiency in React.js and Node.js. Implied by the senior level: experience in leading projects, making architectural decisions, and integrating AI tools into development processes.
criteriaScores.aiExplanation: The candidate has approximately 2+ years of full-stack development experience at SAT Chasedream and an internship at FPT Software. This falls short of the 4+ years explicitly required for the role. The SAT Chasedream experience is highly relevant, involving full-stack development, RESTful API design, CI/CD, and cloud platforms. However, there is no evidence of leading projects, making architectural decisions, or mentoring team members, which are expected at the senior level. Additionally, there is limited exposure to Node.js and AI tool integration, both of which are critical for this position. The candidate's experience is solid but not at the depth or breadth required for a senior full-stack AI-focused role.

The candidate also lacks direct experience with AI development tools such as Claude, GitHub Copilot, or Cursor, and there is no mention of authentication methods (OAuth, JWT). While the candidate covers many required technologies, the absence of key backend stack experience and advanced AI tool usage is a significant gap for this senior full-stack AI-focused position.

gaps.description: No evidence of leading teams, mentoring junior developers, or making architectural decisions at a senior level.
gaps.suggestion: Seek opportunities to lead small teams, mentor interns or junior developers, and participate in architectural decision-making. Document these experiences with specific examples and outcomes.

gaps.description: No explicit mention of OAuth or JWT implementation in any work experience or project. Spring Security is listed, but without details on authentication protocols.
gaps.suggestion: Build or contribute to a project that implements secure authentication using OAuth and JWT. Add detailed descriptions of these implementations to the resume, highlighting security best practices.

gaps.description: Total professional experience is approximately 2.5 years, which is below the 4+ years required for the role.
gaps.suggestion: Continue to build professional experience, ideally in roles that expand backend and AI tool exposure. Consider freelance or open-source contributions to accelerate experience accumulation.

gaps.description: AI Integration is listed as a skill, but there are no details or examples of specific AI features, models, or tools integrated into products.
gaps.suggestion: Develop a project that integrates a specific AI model or API (e.g., OpenAI, Claude) and document the process and outcomes. Add these details to the resume.

gaps.description: No mention of PostgreSQL experience; only MySQL and Microsoft SQL Server are listed.
gaps.suggestion: Complete a small project or online course using PostgreSQL. Add PostgreSQL to the skills section and reference its use in a project or work context.

gaps.description: No explicit evidence of English proficiency or experience working in English-speaking or international teams.
gaps.suggestion: Pursue English language certification (e.g., IELTS, TOEIC) or participate in international projects where English is the working language. Highlight these experiences on the resume.

gaps.description: No evidence of experience with Node.js, Express, or Nest.js in any work experience, project, or skill listing. All backend experience is in Java (Spring Boot) and C#.
gaps.suggestion: Undertake hands-on projects using Node.js with Express or Nest.js, ideally building RESTful APIs and backend services. Consider contributing to open-source Node.js projects or completing a certification in Node.js backend development to gain practical experience.

gaps.itemName: AI development tools (Claude, GitHub Copilot, Cursor)

gaps.suggestion: Gain hands-on experience with AI development tools by integrating GitHub Copilot or Claude into daily coding workflows. Document specific use cases and outcomes on the resume, and consider publishing a blog or demo project showcasing AI-assisted development.
